narrative:
Concord Twp township has 2,801 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
